caption: In a large, well-lit ballroom with a blue carpeted floor and ornate chandeliers, four people are practicing a synchronized routine. A man in a black sleeveless shirt and white pants, a woman in a white long-sleeved shirt and white pants, a woman in a light green outfit, and a man in a black sleeveless shirt and blue pants stand in a loose line facing forward. An audience is seated in the background. As the sequence progresses, the group transitions from standing still to performing coordinated movements. The man in white raises his arms, the woman in white leans forward with her arms extended, and the man in blue shifts his weight and extends his arm. The woman in green mimics these motions with slight variations. The scene remains in the same location throughout, with the performers shifting positions and postures to execute their choreographed routine.
